filesystem.description: Read and write files in the user's home directory. Used for memory system, learning path, and project file access.

memory.description: In-session knowledge graph memory. Complements the persistent SQLite memory system for short-term working memory within a session.

fetch.description: Fetch web content for research, documentation lookup, and real-time information retrieval.

sequential-thinking.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning for complex problems. Use for architecture decisions, debugging difficult issues, and multi-step planning.

drawio-mcp.description: Optional live draw.io browser editing session. Use only when you need real-time interactive diagram refinement in a browser. For offline .drawio generation, use the drawio skill directly.
